Step.label: Return Callback is not Active (To Remove?)
Warning : ANI has no value
Step.notes: "Warning : No value while trying to get ANI from " & sANIAttribute

Parameter.label: Message
Parameter.value: "Warning : No value while trying to get ANI from " & sANIAttribute

Step.label: Error : ANI is invalid
Step.notes: ANI does not meet Phone Classification Rules

Parameter.label: Message
Parameter.value: "ANI does not meet Phone Classification Rules"

Step.label: Return : No Availability
Step.notes: "There is no Availability to offer Callback"

Parameter.label: Message
Parameter.value: "There is no Availability to offer Callback"

Step.label: Set ATTR_Description
Step.notes: "There is no Availability to offer Callback"

Parameter.label: Call Attribute Value
Parameter.value: "There is no Availability to offer Callback"

Step.label: Set ATTR_Description
Step.notes: "Customer does not want to be called back"

Parameter.label: Call Attribute Value
Parameter.value: "Customer does not want to be called back"
